name: Full Governance Framework
description: Comprehensive governance spanning all coding domains for enterprise
task: Build comprehensive governance framework: establish architectural patterns, enforce code quality standards, implement security review processes, design git workflows, manage semantic versioning, scan dependencies for vulnerabilities, coordinate team processes. Document all standards and ensure compliance.

coding_challenge.description: Write a governance framework orchestrator establishing architectural patterns, code quality enforcement, security reviews, git workflows, semantic versioning, dependency scanning, and team process coordination. Return framework specification.
